title: Owner Hurt By Target Behavior
description: Allows the mob to target another mob that hurts their owner.

entity_types.title: Entity Types
entity_types.description:
List of entity types that this mob can target if they hurt their owner

Properties:
• reevaluate_description (boolean) = false

reevaluate_description.title: Reevaluate Target
reevaluate_description.description: If true, the targeting entity will continuously reevaluate the target and stop attacking if the target no longer meets the filter conditions.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
